name: linSimulateETFCollision
title: linSimulateETFCollision
syntax: dword linSimulateETFCollision (dword etfId, dword respLength, dword numCollisions, byte dataBytes[]); // form 2
description: This function can be used to cause collisions for next coming header(s) of an event-triggered frame.

parameters.name: etfId
parameters.description: LIN frame identifier in the range 0 .. 59

parameters.name: respLength
parameters.description: Number of databytes to be sent as the response on the header of the event-triggered frame. Value range: 1..9. Default: 1

parameters.name: numCollisions
parameters.description: Number of times the specified response has to be applied. Value range: 1..255. Default: 1

parameters.name: Databytes
parameters.description: Array of databytes to be sent as the response. The size of the array shall correspond to the respLength parameter. Default: NULL

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
